title: LN6 5TX, Dovecote Park Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/FP3830BX/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Dovecote Park Limited Installation name: Dovecote Park Skellingthorpe Permit number: EPR/FP3830BX/V002  "
